vocab.example: I try not to clutter up my small studio with too many mirrors, even though they look stylish.

vocab.meaning: thổi luồng sinh khí mới vào, làm mới mẻ
vocab.example: Adding a vintage mirror can really breathe new life into a dull and cramped room.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng dễ chịu, mãn nhãn
vocab.example: After the renovation, the sunburst mirror above the fireplace was a sight for sore eyes.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, tạo sự khác biệt
vocab.example: I chose a mirror with an unconventional shape to help my bedroom decor stand out from the crowd.

vocab.meaning: khan hiếm, quý giá (thường nói về không gian)
vocab.example: Since floor space is at a premium in my apartment, I prefer using wall-mounted mirrors for decoration.

vocab.meaning: ảo giác do ánh sáng tạo ra
vocab.example: It's a clever trick of the light; placing a mirror opposite the window makes the room feel twice as bright.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: I saw a gorgeous handcrafted mirror, but I knew it would cost an arm and a leg to ship it home.

vocab.meaning: công đoạn cuối cùng để hoàn thiện
vocab.example: Installing a large, ornate mirror was the finishing touch my living room needed.

vocab.meaning: đơn điệu, không có gì đặc sắc
vocab.example: My room felt a bit plain Jane before I added a series of decorative mirrors to the main wall.

vocab.meaning: đang là mốt, cực kỳ phổ biến
vocab.example: Minimalist mirrors with thin black frames are all the rage in interior design these days.
